context: Cold-start routing for the regulated change-control slice. Use for first-hop orientation.

sections.topic: regulated change-control purpose and authority posture
sections.content: Use the root layer for regulated change-control purpose, authority posture, and first-hop routing. Harbor Change Control coordinates regulated production changes for clinical data systems and external auditor review. Human-primary SOP pages are allowed only when the pair declares sync_source=human-primary explicitly. Cold-start routing begins at harbor-root and summary routing continues through harbor-capsule.
